full_text:
Li Hui (De’ang) 李恢 (德昂)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Hui (李恢), styledDe’ang (德昂). Persuaded Ma Chao to surrender to Liu Bei, proud of himself. Li Hui was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Li Hui lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
